title: matelea furvescens
intro: Matelea furvescens, also known as the hairy swallowwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Matelea furvescens include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, with the dried leaves and stems often used in herbal remedies.
